description:
Shared EV charging hub within the campus parking area: 12 AC 22 kW
posts (24 connectors) + 2 DC 50 kW rapid chargers. Sized to support
~30% EV penetration across the campus's 64 parking spaces, with
conduits laid for a further 12 AC posts as adoption grows.

loadManagement.managementStrategy: Dynamic load balancing — daytime cap 100 kW, overnight 200 kW, dispatch via smart-charger network

changelog.description: Campus EV charging hub — added with Campus showcase, demonstrates a load-managed shared amenity
